notes_for_human_reviewer: Solid intermediate. Identifies the alignment/decision type-conflation explicitly and proposes splitting. Critiques agenda items as topic labels and proposes outcome rewrites. Addresses both invitees (14 too many, R. Silva multitasking, F. Chen declining, V. Bauer cautionary note about sponsor-in-decision-rooms) AND pre-read (none, recommend reinstating 24h ahead). Proposes structural redesign (30 min, trim attendance, separate vendor decision). Facilitation plan is competent but light — names start-on-time, goal-statement, redirect-drift, and closing summary, but misses surface-dissent move. Tolerance widened to 2 on facilitation_plan because the moves named are right and tied to the meeting but the count is at the 3-4 boundary. Not hire-ready because the analysis is competent but the closing recommendation is bundled rather than tiered (urgent-now vs. propose-for-next-cycle).
